name: Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD)
snippet: The Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD) was developed by the Office of Dietary Supplements (ODS) at the National Institutes of Health (NIH).

snippet: NIH's Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD) is a searchable database of current and historical label information from products marketed in the U.S..
